amazon_frontstage_products.title: Hatch Restore 3 Sunrise Alarm Clock, Sound Machine, Smart Light
amazon_frontstage_products.frontstage_message: phone-free sleep routine, Hatch+ content, unwind nightly, wake gently, one big button / bedside light button
amazon_frontstage_products.source: Sorftime product_detail; Hatch official site; Best Buy retail page

amazon_frontstage_products.title: Sunrise Alarm Clock White Noise Machine
amazon_frontstage_products.frontstage_message: sunrise simulation, 25 sleep sounds, Bluetooth, 0-100% dimmer, no app, physical buttons

amazon_frontstage_products.title: Wood Grain Sunrise Alarm Clock and Sound Machine Nightlight
amazon_frontstage_products.frontstage_message: cut jarring, awaken sunrise, 26 sounds, one-handed setup, wood decor

amazon_frontstage_products.title: Wake Up Light Sunrise Alarm Clock for Kids, Heavy Sleepers
amazon_frontstage_products.frontstage_message: kids / heavy sleepers, dual alarms, FM radio, snooze, nightlight, 7 colors

amazon_frontstage_products.title: Philips SmartSleep Wake-up Light
amazon_frontstage_products.frontstage_message: clinically proven, colored sunrise/sunset, lighting expertise, 5 natural sounds, reading lamp

amazon_frontstage_products.title: Alarm Clock with Sound Machine
amazon_frontstage_products.frontstage_message: low-price 2-in-1 white noise machine, soft alarm, ambient night light

Hatch Restore 3 B0DLLSCVZW.interpretation: Hatch 同时吃品牌词、泛闹钟词、声音机词和卧室/夜灯词，说明其运营不是单一 sunrise 词，而是 routine + bedroom + sound + alarm 的组合。

Odokee B0DGXD6WVW.interpretation: Odokee 是最清晰的 Hatch 平替型运营：自然位在 sunrise alarm clock 表现强，同时承接 Hatch 品牌词和 sound machine 需求。

REACHER B0BZW7WY5M.interpretation: REACHER 用 wood decor 和 one-handed setup 做差异，但仍需要广告/自然位覆盖 Hatch、sunrise、sound machine 三类词。

JALL B081CHLF46.interpretation: JALL 更像旧式 wake-up light / clock radio / kids-heavy-sleeper 战场，评论数强，但运营表达偏功能堆叠。

sunrise_alarm_clock_keyword_detail.note: avg price unit returned as raw 4458; likely cents but not confirmed by tool, so analysis uses price-band direction rather than exact average.

sound_machine_alarm_clock_search_results: traditional alarm clocks dominate top rows: La Crosse, Nelsonic, Emerson, Sharp
sunrise/sound machine combo products appear but many have low or zero monthly sales
Dreamegg / Better Homes & Gardens / Emerson show Walmart has price-led mass retail variants

similar_product_signal: top results are mostly plug-in night lights, under cabinet lights, motion sensor lights, ambient decor lights, kids projector/night lights
top monthly sales examples include SZHLUX night light 22445 units at $11.99, SHINE PAL under cabinet light 9190 units at $20.36, and generic USB rechargeable night light 5536 units at $3.19
wake up light query does not return a clean sunrise alarm clock pool
tiktok_summary.author_signal: tiktok_author returns broad high-follower creators, not a clean sleep-routine creator list; must be manually filtered before influencer planning.
tiktok_summary.implication: TikTok should be used for bedroom-lighting visual content and scenario discovery, not as direct proof that sunrise alarm clock content converts.

official independent-site reference for non-Amazon wake-up-light positioning and warranty/trial language
third-party usability evidence about button complexity
